description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover notebook with a matte black cover, featuring a molded plastic pen holder attached to the front. Several colorful adhesive page markers—blue, pink, and purple—protrude from the edges, indicating marked sections within. Two black ribbon bookmarks extend from the spine, adding to its functionality and organization. The book's edges are slightly rounded, and the cover appears sturdy and durable. The pages inside are cream-colored and of moderate thickness, typical for a notebook or journal. The overall appearance is utilitarian yet organized, suitable for personal or professional use in an urban environment.
description: A matte black hardcover notebook with a molded pen holder, colorful page markers, and ribbon bookmarks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the book, the pen holder on the cover, and several colored page markers sticking out.
description_view_1: Back view highlighting the flat black cover, the ends of the ribbon bookmarks, and the colored tabs along the edge.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the pen holder, the arrangement of page markers, and the black ribbons extending outward.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full cover with the molded pen holder, the distribution of colored tabs, and the ribbons trailing from the spine.
